title: Engineering Manager
description: Lead high-performing technical teams, combining deep engineering background with outstanding leadership and strategy.

courses.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
courses.description: Your journey to mastery by David Thomas and Andrew Hunt.

courses.title: The Manager's Path
courses.description: A Guide for Tech Leaders Navigating Growth and Change by Camille Fournier.

courses.title: Accelerate (Nicole Forsgren et al.)
courses.description: The Science of Lean Software and DevOps: Building and Scaling High Performing Technology Organizations.

courses.title: High Output Management
courses.description: The essential management playbook by Andrew S. Grove.

details.importance: They are the multipliers. A great EM transforms a group of talented individuals into an unstoppable, cohesive engine of delivery.
details.rolesAndResponsibilities: Hiring, mentoring, managing delivery timelines, resolving conflicts, and acting as the bridge between technical and business domains.
details.aiImpact: Minimal. Management deals primarily with human psychology, motivation, and complex, ambiguous organizational politics—areas where AI falls flat.
details.marketDemand: Very high. Highly capable engineers often struggle with leadership, making good managers a rare commodity.

expectations.junior: Manage a small team (3-5 engineers), conduct 1:1s, and ensure sprint goals are hit.
expectations.mid: Manage larger teams (5-12), handle performance reviews, lead hiring, and shape technical roadmaps.
expectations.senior: Director-level (managing managers), defining organizational structures, and managing budgets.
